16: package com.mycila.maven.plugin.license.dependencies;
17: 
18: import org.apache.maven.artifact.Artifact;
19: import org.apache.maven.artifact.resolver.filter.ArtifactFilter;
20: import org.apache.maven.artifact.resolver.filter.CumulativeScopeArtifactFilter;
21: import org.apache.maven.execution.MavenSession;
22: import org.apache.maven.model.License;
23: import org.apache.maven.plugin.logging.Log;
24: import org.apache.maven.project.DefaultProjectBuilder;
25: import org.apache.maven.project.DefaultProjectBuildingRequest;
26: import org.apache.maven.project.MavenProject;
27: import org.apache.maven.project.ProjectBuilder;
28: import org.apache.maven.project.ProjectBuildingException;
29: import org.apache.maven.project.ProjectBuildingRequest;
30: import org.apache.maven.shared.dependency.graph.DependencyGraphBuilder;
31: import org.apache.maven.shared.dependency.graph.DependencyGraphBuilderException;
32: import org.apache.maven.shared.dependency.graph.DependencyNode;
33: import org.apache.maven.shared.dependency.graph.internal.Maven31DependencyGraphBuilder;
34: 
35: import java.util.Collections;
36: import java.util.HashSet;
37: import java.util.List;
38: import java.util.Map;
39: import java.util.Optional;
40: import java.util.Set;
41: import java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap;
42: import java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentMap;
43: 
44: /**
45:  * Helper class for building Artifact/License mappings from a maven project
46:  * (multi module or single).
47:  *
48:  * @author Royce Remer
49:  */
50: public class MavenProjectLicenses implements LicenseMap, LicenseMessage {
51: 
52:   private Set<MavenProject> projects;
53:   private DependencyGraphBuilder graph;
54:   private ProjectBuilder projectBuilder;
55:   private ProjectBuildingRequest buildingRequest;
56:   private ArtifactFilter filter;
57:   private Log log;
58: 
59:   /**
60:    * @param projects       the Set of {@link MavenProject} to scan
61:    * @param graph          the {@link DependencyGraphBuilder} implementation
62:    * @param projectBuilder the maven {@link ProjectBuilder} implementation
63:    * @param log            the log to sync to
64:    */
65:   public MavenProjectLicenses(final Set<MavenProject> projects, final DependencyGraphBuilder graph,
66:                               final ProjectBuilder projectBuilder, final ProjectBuildingRequest buildingRequest,
67:                               final ArtifactFilter filter, final Log log) {
68:     this.setProjects(projects);
69:     this.setBuildingRequest(buildingRequest);
70:     this.setGraph(graph);
71:     this.setFilter(filter);
72:     this.setProjectBuilder(projectBuilder);
73:     this.setLog(log);
74: 
75:     log.info(String.format("%s %s", INFO_LICENSE_IMPL, this.getClass()));
76:   }
77: 
78:   /**
79:    * @param session        the current {@link MavenSession}
80:    * @param graph          the {@link DependencyGraphBuilder} implementation
81:    * @param projectBuilder the maven {@link ProjectBuilder} implementation
82:    */
83:   public MavenProjectLicenses(final MavenSession session, MavenProject project, final DependencyGraphBuilder graph,
84:                               final ProjectBuilder projectBuilder, final List<String> scopes, final Log log) {
85:     this(Collections.singleton(project), graph, projectBuilder, getBuildingRequestWithDefaults(session),
86:         new CumulativeScopeArtifactFilter(scopes), log);
87:   }
88: 
89:   private static ProjectBuildingRequest getBuildingRequestWithDefaults(final MavenSession session) {
90:     ProjectBuildingRequest request;
91:     if (session == null) {
92:       request = new DefaultProjectBuildingRequest();
93:     } else {
94:       request = session.getProjectBuildingRequest();
95:     }
96:     return request;
97:   }
98: 
99:   /**
100:    * Return a set of licenses attributed to a single artifact.
101:    */
102:   protected Set<License> getLicensesFromArtifact(final Artifact artifact) {
103:     Set<License> licenses = new HashSet<>();
104:     try {
105:       MavenProject project = getProjectBuilder().build(artifact, getBuildingRequest()).getProject();
106:       licenses.addAll(project.getLicenses());
107:     } catch (ProjectBuildingException ex) {
108:       getLog().warn(String.format("Could not get project from dependency's artifact: %s", artifact.getFile()));
109:     }
110: 
111:     return licenses;
112:   }
113: 
114:   /**
115:    * Get mapping of Licenses to a set of artifacts presenting that license.
116:    *
117:    * @param dependencies Set to collate License entries from
118:    * @return the same artifacts passed in, keyed by license
119:    */
120:   protected Map<License, Set<Artifact>> getLicenseMapFromArtifacts(final Set<Artifact> dependencies) {
121:     final ConcurrentMap<License, Set<Artifact>> map = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
122: 
123:     // license:artifact is a many-to-many relationship.
124:     // Each artifact may have several licenses.
125:     // Each artifact may appear multiple times in the map.
126:     dependencies.parallelStream().forEach(artifact -> getLicensesFromArtifact(artifact).forEach(license -> {
127:       map.putIfAbsent(license, new HashSet<>());
128:       Set<Artifact> artifacts = map.get(license);
129:       artifacts.add(artifact);
130:       map.put(license, artifacts);
131:     }));
132: 
133:     return map;
134:   }
135: 
136:   @Override
137:   public Map<License, Set<Artifact>> getLicenseMap() {
138:     return getLicenseMapFromArtifacts(getDependencies());
139:   }
140: 
141:   /**
142:    * Return the Set of all direct and transitive Artifact dependencies.
143:    */
144:   private Set<Artifact> getDependencies() {
145:     final Set<Artifact> artifacts = new HashSet<>();
146:     final Set<DependencyNode> dependencies = new HashSet<>();
147: 
148:     // build the set of maven dependencies for each module in the reactor (might
149:     // only be the single one) and all its transitives
150:     getLog().debug(String.format("Building dependency graphs for %d projects", getProjects().size()));
151:     getProjects().parallelStream().forEach(project -> {
152:       try {
153:         dependencies.addAll(getGraph().buildDependencyGraph(buildingRequest, getFilter()).getChildren());
154:       } catch (DependencyGraphBuilderException ex) {
155:         getLog().warn(
156:             String.format("Could not get children from project %s, it's dependencies will not be checked!",
157:                 project.getId()));
158:       }
159:     });
160: 
161:     // build the complete set of direct+transitive dependent artifacts in all
162:     // modules in the reactor
163:     dependencies.parallelStream().forEach(d -> artifacts.add(d.getArtifact()));
164:     getLog().info(String.format("%s: %d", INFO_DEPS_DISCOVERED, dependencies.size()));
165: 
166:     return artifacts;
167: 
168:     // tempting, but does not resolve dependencies after the scope in which this
169:     // plugin is invoked
170:     // return project.getArtifacts();
171:   }
172: 
173:   protected Set<MavenProject> getProjects() {
174:     return projects;
175:   }
176: 
177:   protected void setProjects(final Set<MavenProject> projects) {
178:     this.projects = Optional.ofNullable(projects).orElse(new HashSet<>());
179:   }
180:

182:     return graph;
183:   }
184: 
185:   private void setGraph(DependencyGraphBuilder graph) {
186:     this.graph = Optional.ofNullable(graph).orElse(new Maven31DependencyGraphBuilder());
187:   }

190:     return projectBuilder;
191:   }
192: 
193:   private void setProjectBuilder(ProjectBuilder projectBuilder) {
194:     this.projectBuilder = Optional.ofNullable(projectBuilder).orElse(new DefaultProjectBuilder());
195:   }

198:     return filter;
199:   }

202:     this.filter = filter;

215:   }
